title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 529.040 - Proceedings therein
text:
529.040.  Proceedings therein. — Such further proceedings shall be had therein for the determination thereof, and in such manner as might be had if the person suing out such writ had brought his civil action for false return.
(RSMo 1939 § 1699) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1535; 1919 § 1985; 1909 § 2549
